name: example-admin-saas-bestseller
title: SaaS Admin Bestseller
description: The market-leading SaaS admin archetype — polished light-mode dashboard with collapsible sidebar, breadcrumb topbar, 4 stat tiles, primary chart, recent table, side activity. Modeled after the Metronic / Vuexy / Velzon family that dominates Themeforest's admin category.

query.en: Build me a polished SaaS admin dashboard for a B2B product — left sidebar, breadcrumb topbar, 4 KPI tiles, revenue chart, recent customers table, activity feed.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a polished SaaS admin dashboard for a B2B product — left sidebar, breadcrumb topbar, 4 KPI tiles, revenue chart, recent customers table, activity feed.
